##  вАО вАО вАОвАО вАО вАО вАО  вАО вАО вАО вАО вАО  вАО вАО вАОвАО вАО вАО вАО  вАО вАО вАО вАОвАО вАО вАО вАО Check out [Reignite MC Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/reignite-mc-lite) for better preformance! 
###   
# рЯФ• Key Features

 **Progression Overhaul рЯ™Ь**вАО 
- Exploration is no longer optional, its essential. Discover a fully reworked system based around the [End Remasterd mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem) with new mechanics, bosses, and mysteries to uncover.
- Using the [Librarians Balance mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/librarians-balance/changelog)
you can no longer abuse villagers for the best enchanted books but rather have to explore to find the book first and only once the book is placed in the lectern can the librarian sell it making the original book valuable more then the villager itself.
- The [EarlyStage mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/earlystage) makes the first in game day a little harder by adding a flint tool set and the requirement to use an axe for logs. Break leaves to get sticks, find gravel to get flint, gather rocks, craft a crafting rock, put sticks and flint on it and hit it a couple times with another rock! 
  
**World Generation рЯПФпЄП**
- All vanilla biomes and structures have been replaced and upgraded with improved variants. The world is now continental meaking it there are islands continents and massive oceans the cold -bioms are to the north and warm bioms to the south making it easy to find the biom you are looking for. The world generation stops after 7k blocks from spawn in each direction so players see each other often enough.

**Life StealвЭ§пЄП**
- Using the life steal mod to encourge PvP on our server without effecting PvE interactions. 

  
# рЯМР Multiplayer Server

**вАОReignite MC is hosted on a public multiplayer server, where you can:
